criteriaResults.criterion: SlideOver component slides in from right side of viewport
criteriaResults.evidence: Component uses animate-slide-in-right class with translateX(100%) to translateX(0) animation. Panel aligned right with justify-end.
Backdrop overlay with bg-black/50 class provides 50% opacity semi-transparent backdrop.

criteriaResults.criterion: Panel has header area for title and close button
criteriaResults.evidence: SlideOverHeader component includes title area and close button with X icon, proper styling and accessibility.

criteriaResults.criterion: Panel has scrollable body area for content
criteriaResults.evidence: SlideOverBody component uses overflow-y-auto class for scrolling, flex-1 for layout.

criteriaResults.criterion: Panel has optional footer area for actions
criteriaResults.evidence: SlideOverFooter component defined as optional sub-component, used in TaskPanel example.

criteriaResults.criterion: Close button (X) in header closes panel
criteriaResults.evidence: Close button onClick triggers handleClose which animates and calls onClose callback.
handleBackdropClick verifies e.target === e.currentTarget to close only on backdrop click.
Escape key listener added when open, calls handleClose on Escape press.

criteriaResults.criterion: Focus trapped inside panel when open
criteriaResults.evidence: useFocusTrap hook prevents Tab from escaping, wraps focus from first to last and vice versa.
Tailwind animations configured for 300ms duration, component manages animation state with 300ms timeouts.
createPortal used to render to document.body, verified by E2E test.
onClose prop defined in interface, called in handleClose function.

criteriaResults.criterion: Works correctly in both light and dark modes
criteriaResults.evidence: All elements include dark: variant classes, E2E test verifies dark mode rendering.
All prop interfaces defined and exported: SlideOverProps, SlideOverHeaderProps, SlideOverBodyProps, SlideOverFooterProps.

e2eResults.regressionNote: All 8 failures are from task-7.1-validation.spec.ts (prior task), unrelated to Task 18. No new regressions introduced.

handoff.handoffNotes: All acceptance criteria verified and passing. SlideOver component fully implemented with compound component pattern, React Portal rendering, focus trap, animations, accessibility features, and dark mode support. All 12 new E2E tests pass. No regressions introduced. Implementation follows project patterns from SPEC/HOW.md.
